items.content_statement: Identify emotions in a book, picture, or on someone's face
items.classification_rationale: Procedural skill with clear observable criteria - Type 1

items.content_statement: Describe themselves (interests, family, looks, gender)
items.classification_rationale: Procedural skill with clear observable criteria - Type 1

items.content_statement: Show positive self-identity
items.classification_rationale: Sustained orientation enacted over time across contexts - Type 3

items.content_statement: Display pride in their accomplishments
items.classification_rationale: Sustained orientation enacted over time across contexts - Type 3

items.content_statement: Ask for support from adults when needed
items.classification_rationale: Procedural skill with clear observable criteria - Type 1

items.content_statement: Begin to recognize their own emotions before reacting
items.classification_rationale: Sustained default orientation - emotional self-awareness that operates across contexts over time

items.content_statement: Use words and respectful language to express thoughts and emotions
items.classification_rationale: Sustained default orientation - communication pattern enacted across contexts over time

items.content_statement: Increasingly use a variety of strategies to self-soothe
items.classification_rationale: Sustained default orientation - self-regulation capacity enacted across contexts over time

items.content_statement: Attempt to complete tasks independently
items.classification_rationale: Sustained default orientation - independence as enacted approach across contexts over time

items.content_statement: Demonstrate confidence in meeting their own needs
items.classification_rationale: Sustained default orientation - self-efficacy as enacted across contexts over time

items.content_statement: Seek new challenges with familiar materials and activities
items.classification_rationale: Sustained default orientation - growth-seeking behavior enacted across contexts over time

items.content_statement: Describe a range of individual characteristics and interests and communicate how these are similar or different from other people
items.classification_rationale: Procedural skill with clear performance criteria - describing and communicating comparisons

items.content_statement: Begin to recognize the emotions of peers and respond with empathy and compassion
items.classification_rationale: Sustained orientation - empathy and compassion as enacted default responses across contexts

items.content_statement: Recognize appropriate reactions to social situations
items.classification_rationale: Analytical capability deployed when social situations arise - multiple valid interpretive frameworks for appropriateness

items.content_statement: Show care and concern for others
items.classification_rationale: Sustained orientation - care and concern as enacted default behaviors across contexts

items.content_statement: Express gratitude for someone or something in their life
items.classification_rationale: Procedural skill with clear performance criteria - expressing gratitude

items.content_statement: Communicate how other children or adults may be feeling and why
items.classification_rationale: Analytical capability - interpreting emotions and reasoning about causes across multiple frameworks

items.content_statement: Maintain friendships over time
items.classification_rationale: Sustained default orientation that exists only as enacted across contexts and time

items.content_statement: Demonstrate strategies for participating in social play with peers
items.classification_rationale: Occasion-triggered skill deployed when social play situations arise

items.content_statement: Express feelings and needs, including in conflict situations
items.classification_rationale: Occasion-triggered skill deployed when expression is needed or conflicts arise

items.content_statement: Engage in prosocial behavior such as cooperating, compromising, turn-taking, and resolving social conflict
items.classification_rationale: Sustained default orientation toward prosocial behavior enacted across social contexts

items.content_statement: Seek and accept help when needed
items.classification_rationale: Sustained default orientation toward help-seeking enacted across contexts

items.content_statement: Use problem-solving strategies independently or with adult prompting when feeling angry or frustrated
items.classification_rationale: Occasion-triggered skill deployed when specific emotional states arise

items.content_statement: Show eagerness to learn about a variety of topics
items.classification_rationale: Sustained default orientation - eagerness to learn operates by default across contexts, not deployed when situations call for it

items.content_statement: Consider ideas from adults and other children in finding a solution or strategy
items.classification_rationale: Occasion-triggered analytical capability - deployed when problem-solving situations arise

items.content_statement: Seek and accept help when needed
items.classification_rationale: Sustained default orientation - help-seeking operates as ongoing disposition across contexts

items.content_statement: Use problem-solving strategies independently or with adult prompting
items.classification_rationale: Occasion-triggered capability - deployed when problem-solving situations call for it

items.content_statement: Identify people in the community who can help them (e.g., firefighter, nurse)
items.classification_rationale: Propositional knowledge - factual content about community helpers and their roles

items.content_statement: Learn and follow basic personal health and safety rules
items.classification_rationale: Propositional knowledge - factual content about health and safety rules to be learned
